code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant D as DApp
    participant W as Wallet
    actor U as User
    participant CA as Chain A
    participant CB as Chain B
    activate D
    D->>+W: wallet_getCapabilities
    W-->>-D: Capabilities
    D->>D: Validate supported capabilities
    D->>+W: wallet_sendCalls
    W->>W: Compute solutions for requirements
    W->>+U: Prompt to sign bridge transaction from Chain B to Chain A
    U-->>-W: User approves
    W->>+CB: Send bridge transaction
    CB-->>-W: Transaction receipt
    W->>W: Wait for requirements to be fulfilled
    W->>+U: Prompt to sign intended transaction
    U-->>-W: User approves
    W->>+CA: Send main transaction
    CA-->>-W: Transaction receipt
    W-->>-D: Transaction completed
    deactivate D

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个跨链交易的时序图，场景是用户在DApp里发起操作，但资金在Chain B上，目标操作在Chain A上。核心是要体现Wallet先帮用户解决跨链桥接，再执行主交易。
明白了，所以Wallet在这里不只是签名工具，还要主动计算解决方案？那第一步是不是DApp先查询Wallet的能力，确认支持这种跨链场景？
对，DApp要先调用wallet_getCapabilities，拿到能力列表后自己校验一下。确认支持之后，再发wallet_sendCalls把需求丢给Wallet。
好的，我先把DApp激活，画上获取能力和发送调用的流程。Wallet收到sendCalls之后，内部先Compute solutions for requirements，然后第一次提示用户签名桥接交易——这里是从Chain B到Chain A的跨链操作。
elements_involved: Prompt to sign bridge transaction from Chain B to Chain A

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 等等，桥接交易发出后，Wallet需要等跨链确认吧？不是立刻就能发主交易的。
elements_involved: Wait for requirements to be fulfilled

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 没错，Wallet收到Chain B的Transaction receipt之后，要Wait for requirements to be fulfilled，等桥接完成。然后才第二次提示用户签名intended transaction，最后发往Chain A。
elements_involved: Wait for requirements to be fulfilled

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 最后Chain A返回receipt给Wallet，Wallet再通知DApp整个流程完成，DApp就可以结束了。
画好了。整个流程：DApp激活→查能力→发需求→Wallet计算→用户签桥接→发往Chain B→等确认→用户签主交易→发往Chain A→返回完成→DApp结束。激活和 deactivate 也标上了，跨链的两段用户确认都清晰体现。
elements_involved: Prompt to sign bridge transaction from Chain B to Chain A
Wait for requirements to be fulfilled
